author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu hoert na mi, ic sal beghinnen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ene aventure tellen van minnen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die den dorperen no den doren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Niet bestaet, dat sise horen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 5  Maer die redene merken connen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende van minnen hebben ghewonnen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide bliscap ende rouwe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Sijt clerc, zijt leec, zijt hoefsche vrouwe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dien annics datter wese bi

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 10  Daer dese aventure vertellet si.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Oec en willics niet verbieden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te hoerne allen hoefschen lieden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die evel ende ghoet bekinnen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hets al van ener ghestadegher minnen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 15  Beide van bliscapen ende van rouwen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu merct, ghi heren ende ghi vrouwen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dies heeft die minne vremden zede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat haer die rouwe volghet mede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Men moet corten ende linghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 20  Die tale, sal mense te rime bringhen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende te redenen die aventure.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hets worden herde te sure

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van Assenede Diederike.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dien seldijs danken ghemeenlike,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 25  Dat hijt uten Walsche heeft ghedicht

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende verstandelike in Dietsche bericht

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Den ghenen, diet Walsche niet en connen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Tierst heeft hi dus beghonnen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende segt, hoe ghedane wijs

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 30  Blancefloer ende Florijs,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Twee scone kinder, worden gheboren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die in haren live meneghen toren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hadden van minnen ende rouwen vele

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende dicke bliscap met groten spele.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 35  Soe wie so rechter minnen pleghet,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende si hem ghestadelike leghet

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vaste in siere herten binnen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dicke ghevalt dat hem van minnen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Gheschiet gheval na onghevalle,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 40  Dies hebben wi ghenoech gheweten alle,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende na gheluc groot ongheval,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als ic van desen tween tellen sal

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In der historien, die ghi selt horen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe meneghen rouwe, hoe meneghen toren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 45   Si beide ghewonnen in haren daghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van rechter minnen, die si plaghen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ooc waren si dicke zoe vro,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si liever hadden te leven also

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dan te zijn in hemelrike.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 50  Binnen dien quam een ongheval haestelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende warpse beide van hoghen neder

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Uter bliscap inden rouwe weder.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer zijn vele die dat segghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vanden ghenen, die haer herte legghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 55  Soe ghestadelike an die minne,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hem comt van dommen zinne;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat selen wi over loghen houden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Wi hebben ghehoort van Ysouden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe si minde haers mans neve Trustram,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 60  Ende hoe Parijs minde Helenam,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende van anderen vele niemaren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die hovesch ende natuerlic waren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dier men seyt ende tellet vele

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In aventuren ende in spele,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 65  Maer des en quam mi niet te voren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van dommen lieden ende van doren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si noit van herten minden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Wilden sijs hem ooc onder winden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si souden die minne verwerken zeere.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 70  Si beghevens bat ende doen haer eere

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si die minne niet verwerken,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende latenre pleghen hovesschen clerken,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hovesschen ridderen ende hovesschen vrouwen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat zijn die minnen met rechter trouwen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 75  Ende emmer der minnen zijn onderdaen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Haer en mach ghene cracht wederstaen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si en doet dat haer becomt te doene.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat scheen den wisen Salomoene:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Al hadde hi cracht ende wijsdom groot,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 80  Hi moeste minnen als zijt gheboet,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Al ware hire gherne bleven sonder.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Bedi en darf niement hebben wonder,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si dese twee kinder dwanc.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die beide waren jonc ende cranc,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 85  Daer ic of segghe daventure

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende telle, al wort het mi te sure,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een deel van harre gherechter minnen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu hoort, hoe ic u sel beghinnen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Wi vinden ghescreven, als ghi selt horen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 90  Dat bi ouden tiden hier te voren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een heyden coninc uut Spaengen quam,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Tierst dat hi den somer vernam

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Bringhen dat nuwe loof ende dat gras;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Fenus dies conincs name was.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 95  Te scepe quam hi met vele lieden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als hem zijn vroede man rieden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hi sciere meerde an een sant,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende ghinc op inder kerstinen lant.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Roof ende brant dedi stichten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 100  Die mure breken, die borghe slichten;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Cloesters, monstre ende gods huus

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dede testoren die coninc Fenus.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Man ende wijf si al versloeghen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Haren roof si te scepe droeghen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 105  Soe waest ghewoest in viertich daghen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si der kerstinen gheen en saghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: No en vonden der haven mee

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Binnen dertich milen vander zee.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als sijt al hadden ghestoort,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 110  Menighe scone borch ende poort,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Gheboot die coninc, dat men loede

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die scepen metten groten ghoede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hier binnen quam hem te voren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hi viertich ridderen hadde vercoren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 115  Die duchtich ende van prise waren.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Wapenen dede hise ende hietse varen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Op die montaenge ende beriden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die weghen, die straten in allen ziden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende roven die pelgrime of sise vonden;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 120  Men soude binnen der selver stonden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die scepen laden ende reden die vaert,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te keerne weder te Spaengen waert.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si wapenden hem haestelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende voeren wech gheweldelike,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 125  Ende beleiden die borghe in allen ziden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Al daer wech was ende lide.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si reden vort, si reden weder;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe saghen si vanden borghe neder

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Pelgreme, die vele moede quamen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 130  Tierst dat sise vernamen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Reden si hem tenen ghemoete,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende beghondense roven onsoete,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende sloeghen diese wilden slaen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die pelgreme en mochten niet ontghaen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 135  No met crachte hem onthouden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe si saghen, dat si sterven souden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si boden haer handen ende ghaven

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een groot deel van harre haven,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende verdingheden lijf ende lede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 140  Daer was oec een Fransoys mede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die grave was ende van edelen gheslachte.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Om dat hi hem weerde met crachte,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: En wilden die Torke niet leven laten.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die bleef daer versleghen inder straten.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 145  Ene zijn dochter hi met hem hadde brocht,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die een heylichdom soude hebben besocht

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te Rome, daerse haer bisscop sinde.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Haer man hadse ghelaten met kinde,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer hi was inden stride bleven doot.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 150  Daer was si doe in groter noot:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si sach verslaen haren vader.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat moestese ghedoghen algader

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende nochtan vele meer daer toe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Want si namen haer selven doe

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 155  Ende voerdense wenende ende claghende sere

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Voor den coninc haren here,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die hem so willecome was.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe hise sach, ghedacht hem das,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe hi vander coninginne sciet

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 160  In sijn lant, daer hise liet,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si seide hoe gherne si name

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ene kerstijn joncfrouwe, of hire an quame,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hise vinghe ende hise haer brachte.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als hise sach ende hijs ghedachte,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 165  Seide hi dat hise haer voeren soude,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende dede craieren dat hi varen woude.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe traken si alle te scepe waert.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hem was wel verghaen haer vaert,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si hadden ghewonnen herde vele,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 170  Ende voeren wech met vollen zele

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende worden in corter stont gheset

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In Spaengen indie haven van Tolet.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die niemare liep voren indie poort:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die ierst ghevreischt, hi tellet voort;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 175  Dus maket deen den andren cont,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dattie coninc waer comen ghesont

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende alle die waren inde vaert.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die lieden liepen ter havenen waert

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende waren blide van haren maghen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 180  Dat sise behouden comen saghen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Men ontfinc den coninc met groter eeren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide vrouwen ende heeren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende der kindren volghden vele.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vrolike ghinc hi op die zele

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 185  Ende beghan te deelen zijn ghewin:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Somen gaf hi meer, somen min,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat conste hi wel bescheidelike.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doen nam hi herde hovesschelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Bider hant die ghevanghen vrouwe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 190  Die int herte droech groten rouwe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat mochtmen wel an haer bekinnen;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die ghaf hi te deele der coninginne,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Diese alte hant inde camere dede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende gaf haer orlof haren zede

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 195  Te houden ende die selve wet,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die den kerstinen lieden was gheset.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Haer wet hielt si alsoe redelike,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Harre vrouwen dienese ghetrouwelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In allen tiden spade ende vroe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 200  Want het stont haer daer toe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si leerde haer Fransoys ghenoech;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Soe bewarf si ende bedroech

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si wart van groten love

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide inden lande ende inden hove;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 205  Het was goet al dat si wrachte.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si was van hoghen gheslachte

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Mochtmen an haer ghedochte merken.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Tenen tiden soudese werken

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Haren heere den coninc ene baniere;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 210  Si wrachter in menighe diere;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Indie middel wracht zire inne

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met den coninc die coninginne.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer wart die coninginne gheware

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: An haer ghelaet, an haer ghebare,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 215  Daer sise sach roden ende bleiken

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende metten handen ten lanken reiken

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende menighe varwe ontfaen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si met kinde was bevaen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe beghan sijt haer an tiën

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 220  Ende bad haer, dat sijt soude liën,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Of si kint droech, jeghen hare,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende welctijt het ghewonnen ware.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe seide sijt haer bescheidenlike.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die vrouwe seide dier ghelike,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 225  Dat si vanden selven stonden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hadde kint ghedraghen, ende si begonden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te rekenen, alse de vrouwen pleghen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Datsi even langhe hadden ghedreghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende binnen enen daghe souden ghenesen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 230  Ende even varinghe quite wesen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die tijt leed also God woude,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dattie coninginne ghenesen soude

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Entie termt volcomen was.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Eens Palmen sondaechs si ghenas

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 235  Van enen sconen knapeline.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe ghaven hem die maghesine

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Uut haren boeken, na hare wijs,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een sconen name ende hieten Florijs.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dies selves daghes ghenas van kinde

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 240  Die ghevangen vrouwe, alsict bescreven vinde,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende brachte inde werelt een maghedijn.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe dedem hebben die moeder sijn

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Na onse wet zijn kerstenhede;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blancefloer zijt heten dede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 245  Doe waren die kinder beide gheboren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer ghi daventure of selt horen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu ghewan die coninc sijn kint

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Soe lief ende hi haddet so ghemint,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si peinsden, hi ende sijn moeder,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 250   Wien zijt mochten bevelen vroeder.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si mindent ghelijc haers selfs lijf,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende bevalent den kerstinen wijf,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat sijt soude houden ende voeden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Maer men hiet haer des behoeden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 255  Dat sijt selve en soeghde niet.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Men bevalt te soghene ende hiet

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Eenre heydenre voestre, diere toe dochte,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si conincs kint soghen mochte.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu hadde die kersten die kinder beide;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 260  Daer toe hadsi goede ghereide

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In allen tiden spade ende vroe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende dede, dat hem behoorde daer toe:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te tide slapen, te tide waken,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te tide haer bad ende bedde maken.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 265  Soe lief had sise beide ghewonnen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat wi ghelesen niet en connen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Na dien datmen ghescreven vint,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Welc si hadde meest ghemint,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Soe haer dochter, soe des conincs zone.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 270  Si was emmer dies ghewone,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat sise beide leide te samen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Eer si tharen vijf jaren quamen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die minne scootse int herte richte

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende wondese soe met enen schichte;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 275  Dat schicht was van goeden ghewerke,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende deedse minnen even sterke.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu hoort vremtheit, die si daden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat si te gader souden baden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Herde goetliken si hem onder saghen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 280  Ende onder custen hem, daer si laghen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide te gader in ene wieghe.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat was al waer, ons en bedrieghe

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dese boec ende andre, daer wi inne

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Al vinden ghescreven haer minne.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 285  Als si waren comen tharen vijf jaren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van scoenre groten si beide waren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende tallen goeden werken ghekeert.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Diese ghewijst hadden ende gheleert,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si waren waert van groten lone.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 290  Die kinder waren beide so scone,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Datmen daer no in gheen lant

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Soe scone twee kinder noit en vant.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als die coninc hadde vernomen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat zijn kint soe verre was comen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 295  Dat het mochte ter scole ghaen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende lettren kennen ende verstaen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Riep hi te hem sinen zone,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als hi dicke was ghewone.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: "Minne", seit hi, "ic sal di ter scolen doen:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 300  Di sal leren meester Gaydoen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een wijs meester ende een vroet."

author: Diederic van Assenede

text: Datter also vele jegen staen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende oft gi wint, gheeft hem weder saen

author: Diederic van Assenede

text: Dus ghewindi sine hulde ie lanc so meer.

text: Daer na, alst ghenoeghet u beiden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende bidden, dat ghi met hem et.

text: Sijn hande sal hi u bieden te werdene u man.

text: Des weest ghereet ende ontfaten dan,

text: Soe na comen onsen torre."

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: "Heere", seit hi, "spiere en wasic nie:

text: Die portwerder ontfinghen blidelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: An hare doot laghe grote scade;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3780  Nie makede God so sconen lijf

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: No an man, alsi hadden, no an wijf,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Soe scone ghedane, so scone sede."

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe riepen die heren alle mede:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: "[Here, nadien dat aldus staet],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3785  [So vergevet hem beiden die mesdaet]

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: [Ende verhoort uwer heren bede],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: [Want dat ware grote edelhede],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat [ghi ghenade hadt te desen]".

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe en wilde hi jeghen hem allen niet wesen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3790  Om dat sijs so oemoedelike baden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Den kindren ende diet hem hadden gheraden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vergaf hijt al, dies hadde hi lof

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van allen den ghenen, die waren int hof.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe saghen die kinder haren bliden dach.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3795  Herde minlic elc op andren sach,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Het was hem comen na haren wille.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe dede men maken een ghestille.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Floris beghan sijn ghesciente tellen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Voerden ammirael ende sine ghesellen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3800  Dat sijt alle wel mochten horen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Tierst telde hi, hoe si waren gheboren;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe tilec haerlijc andren minde;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe menne daer omme ter Montoriën sinde,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hi daer soude ghaen ter scolen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3805  Ende hoe si hem binnen dien wart verstolen;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hoese sijn vader dede vercopen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Te Nicle ter marct, ende dede lopen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die niemare, dat si ware doot;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hoene sijn vader doe onboot;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3810  Ende hoe groten rouwe hi om haer dreef,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hijs cume te live bleef,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hijs die waerheit doe ghevreischte,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hi haer volghde ende om haer eischte;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe grote pine hi doeghde om hare mee,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3815  Meneghen anxt opt lant, menighen in der see;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hoe hi te Babyloniën quam in die stat

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende sinen waert om raet bat,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hoe wel hi hem gheriet daer toe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hoe hi den portwerder verlistechde doe;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3820  Met sire haven, met sinen scatte

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vercreech hi an hem datte,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat menne met rosen inden corf droech.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Tierst dat hi des ghewoech,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Datten si twee [dus hadden gedregen],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3825  Doe [wonderde hem allen, dier waren jegen],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende [damirael selve loech];

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende hoe [men hem te Clarise droech],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Toter wile dat[se damirael vant],

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende tswaert over hem hilt in die hant.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3830  Als hi gheënt hadde sine tale,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ghinc hi bet naerre den ammirale

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende viel opt erde hem te voete neder

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende bat, dat hi hem ghave weder

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer hi dor doeghde so grote pine,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3835  Ende seide, hi hadde liever te sine

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: In groten tormente ende te stervene

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dan levende Blancefloeren te dervene.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Nu moeghdi horen grote edelhede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die dammirael an Florise dede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3840  Alle diet saghen warens blide:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hi dede sitten neven sire side,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blancefloere dede hi comen te hem

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende namse bider hant ende seide: "Vrient, nem,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hier ghevic di weder dese joncfrouwe

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3845  Ende beveelse di op dine trouwe.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: U beiden ghevic lijf ende lede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dor Gode ende der heren bede

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blijfdi verlost van groten lede."

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe vielen si hem te voete bede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3850  Hi cussese ende deedse op staen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Florise maecte hi ridder saen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Als men daer plach int lant.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blancefloere dede hi nemen te hant

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende leiden te monstre met groter eren.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3855  Beide der vrouwen ende der heren

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Volgheden hem utermaten vele,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe ontboet hi Clarise haer ghespele,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hise te wive nemen woude

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende te haerre beider live houden soude,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3860  Ende deedse cronen herde eerlike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende makese vrouwe vanden rike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Voer die heren ende sine ghenote.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer maectemen brulochte grote.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer waren speel mannen vergadert vele

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3865  Met menigher manieren van snaer spele,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Vedelen, gigen, herpen, roten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met soeten gheclanke ende met soeten noten.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide inden palaise ende daer uut

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Was groot gheclanc ende gheluut.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3870  Daer was ghegheven menich rijclic cleet.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Binnen dien was dat eten ghereet

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met dieren gherechten ende dies ghenoech.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Men eisschede water ende men dwoech.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die ammirael ghinc sitten inde scoenste stede,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3875  Opt rikelicste sitten, ende hi dede

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Neven hem sitten sijn wijf Clarise;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blancefloere die hovessche entie wise

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dede hi sitten bander side.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Neven haer sat Floris vro ende blide.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3880  Daer was vol hof ende brulocht groot.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer ne hadde niement wenschens noot.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die daer ten etene waren gheseten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Men brachte hem vort ghedichte eten;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Inne can ghenomen elc gherecht.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3885  Al sonder garsoen ende knecht,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die daer vele waren utermaten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: So dienden daer wel hondert drossaten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hondert spindren, hondert bottelgiere.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: So rijclic eten noch so diere

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3890  Ne was nie ghereet tenen hove,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: No so scone ghedient, no so wel te love.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer was als ghenoech, wilt ende tam:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: So wat so elken wel bequam,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Des dede men hem te vollen bringhen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3895  Der goudine coppen daer vele gingen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met dieren clareite ende al omme te stride

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met morate, met wine an elke side.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat wilde God niet, dat iement soude

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Uut nappen drinken, hi ne waer van goude.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3900  Binnen dien dat si dus saten

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met groter bliscap ende aten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Quamen twee riddren, die Floris sochten

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met seghelen ende met brieven, die si brochten.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ghestadelike quamen si ende met sinne.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3905  Den ammirael grueten si ten iersten beghinne;

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer na seiden si groot saluut

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Florise, daer si omme quamen uut,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende seiden hem, dat beide gader

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doot waren moeder ende vader.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3910  "Here", seggen si, "hoort wat u onbieden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: U man entie hoechste van uwen lieden,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die ons te lanc waren te noemene nu:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si bidden herde ende onbieden u,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat ghi te lande comt haestelike

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3915  Te berechten u lant ende u rike."

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe Floris vernam sijns vader doot

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende siere moeder, doe hadde hi rouwe groot,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Beide hi ende Blancefloer hadden groot seer,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Elc dier waren droefden te meer.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3920  Si keerden weder ten ammirale

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Al wenende met soeter tale

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende baden orlof te lande te verne.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dammirael hadse onthouden gherne

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende bat vriendelike, dat si bleven,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3925  Hi soude hem al, des si behoefden, gheven.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Florijs seide, no scat, no have,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: No goet ne gheen, dat men hem gave,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: En mochten int lant niet behouden.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Alse dammirael vernam, dat sine wouden

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3930  Te hem niet bliven, wi vinden ghescreven,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hi Florise te sire vaert dede gheven

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van sinen silvere ende van sinen goude

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: So vele, dat hijs nemmeer en woude.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Si ghereeden hem ende namen orlof

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3935  An alle die ghene, die waren int hof.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hem allen jammerde die daer waren,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer sise uten palaise saghen varen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende bevalen Gode haer lijf ende haer ere.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Floris voer wech verdroevet sere,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3940  Om dat beide gader

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doot waren moeder ende vader,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ende andersins blide, dat Blancefloer

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Met hem weder te lande voer.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Sonder lachter voerde hise ende scande

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3945  Te Spaengen binnen sinen lande.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Daer was hi willecome ende wel ontfaen,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Alt conincrike wart hem onderdaen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Doe waest hem comen herde scone.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Sine man daden hem draghen crone

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3950  Ende maecten coninc ende conincinne sijn wijf,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die hi minde vor al sijn selfs lijf.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Om dat Blancefloer ooc kersten was,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Gheliefde hem ende luste das,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat hi wart kersten ende hem dopen dede

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3955  Ende al tvolc van sinen lande mede.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Sint versterf hem al Hongerie

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Van enen sinen oom ende al Bulgerie:

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dus hoghe quam hi in sinen live.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ene dochter haddi bi sinen wive,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3960  Daer wi een deel of seggen moeten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Baerte hietsi metten breden voeten,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Maer des en sel niet vele zijn.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die nam te wive die coninc Puppijn,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Een gheweldich coninc, ende wan an hare

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3965   Een kint, daer vele af te segghen ware,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat was die coninc Kaerle van Vrankerike,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Die menighen borch wan gheweldelike.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Hier salic enden dese aventure.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Blancefloer wart Florise sere te sure,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: 3970  Hi pijnder hem om, God halper hem toe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: So moete hi ons spade ende vroe,

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Dat wi alle onse daden te goeden dingen

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Ten jonxten daghe moeten bringen.

author: Diederic van Assenede
text: Amen.
